checklist.title: Syntax and Compilation
items: Code Compilation: Verify all code compiles without errors
Syntax Validation: Check for syntax errors across all modified files
Type Checking: Validate type safety (TypeScript, Flow, etc.)
Linting: Run linters and fix any violations
Formatting: Ensure code follows project formatting standards

checklist.title: Dependency Validation
items: Import Resolution: Verify all imports resolve correctly
Dependency Updates: Check for any new dependencies added
Version Compatibility: Ensure dependency versions are compatible
Lock File Updates: Update package-lock.json, yarn.lock, etc.
Circular Dependencies: Check for and resolve circular dependencies

checklist.title: Configuration Integrity
items: Config File Validation: Verify configuration file syntax
Environment Variables: Check for required environment variables
Build Configuration: Validate build tool configurations
Database Connections: Test database connectivity if applicable
External Services: Validate external service configurations

checklist.title: Unit Testing
items: Affected Tests: Run all unit tests for modified components
New Test Coverage: Ensure new code has appropriate test coverage
Test Updates: Update existing tests if behavior changed
Mock Validation: Verify mocks and stubs are still accurate
Coverage Threshold: Maintain minimum coverage requirements

checklist.title: Integration Testing
items: API Endpoints: Test all affected API endpoints
Database Operations: Verify database queries and transactions
External Integrations: Test third-party service integrations
Message Queues: Validate message processing if applicable
File Operations: Test file upload/download functionality

checklist.title: End-to-End Testing
items: Critical User Flows: Test primary user journeys
Cross-Browser: Validate functionality across browsers
Mobile Responsiveness: Test mobile compatibility
Performance: Run performance tests on critical paths
Accessibility: Validate accessibility standards compliance
